message.content:
@startuml
title preadapter.service.AnalyzeAST detailed

left to right
  package "service" as service {
    class "AnalyzeAST" as AnalyzeAST {
      + SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML(preadapter.Logger)
      - SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML.datastructure: preadapter.domain.Datastructure
      - SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML.recursiveFileProcess: RecursiveFileProcessor_BRQTO_BRQTC
      - SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML.listFilesPaths: list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC
      - SearchRecurseCSharpToYAML.cu: CompilationUnit
    }
  }

  package "domain" as domain {
    class "Datastructure" as Datastructure {
      + class_to_datastructure: dict[String,SubDataStructure]
      + namespace_to_datastructures: dict[String,list[SubDataStructure]]
      + namespace_to_namespace_list: dict[String,list[String]]
      + skip_types: list[String]
      + logger: preadapter.Logger

      + ResolveClassNames()
      - ResolveClassNames.variables: list_BRQTO_Variable_BRQTC
      - ResolveClassNames.variable: Variable
      - ResolveClassNames.method: Method
      - ResolveClassNames.subDataStructure: SubDataStructure

      + CorrectClassScope(CorrectClassScope:SubDataStructure, CorrectClassScope:list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC)

      + GetFQDNForUsedClassName(GetFQDNForUsedClassName:SubDataStructure)
      - GetFQDNForUsedClassName.classnameList: list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC
      - GetFQDNForUsedClassName.fittingClassNames: String_BRQTO_BRQTC
      - GetFQDNForUsedClassName.bestFittingClassNames: String_BRQTO_BRQTC

      + get_skip_types()
      + append_sub_datastructure(append_sub_datastructure:SubDataStructure)

      + append_class(append_class:list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC, append_class:list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC)
      - append_class.sub_datastructure: SubDataStructure

      + get_classname_list()
      + get_datastructures_from_class_name()
    }

    class "Logger" as Logger {
      + loggingType: preadapter.LoggingType
      - log()
      - log.result: String_BRQTO_BRQTC

      + logError()
      + logError()
      + logWarning()
      + logWarning()
      + logInfo()
      + logInfo()
      + logDebug()
      + logDebug()
      + logTrace()
      + logTrace()
    }
  }

  class "RecursiveFileProcessor_BRQTO_BRQTC" as RecursiveFileProcessor_BRQTO_BRQTC
  class "CompilationUnit" as CompilationUnit
  class "list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC" as list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC

  AnalyzeAST --> Datastructure : uses
  AnalyzeAST --> RecursiveFileProcessor_BRQTO_BRQTC : uses
  AnalyzeAST --> CompilationUnit : uses
  AnalyzeAST --> list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC : uses

  Datastructure --> Logger : uses
  Datastructure --> list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC : uses
  Datastructure --> list_BRQTO_String_BRQTC : uses

  Logger --> AnalyzeAST : uses

  note left of AnalyzeAST
    You are analyzing:
    preadapter.service.AnalyzeAST detailed

    You can click either the namespaces
    or class names for filtering them and their
    direct dependencies.

    Filter

    Select other

    - preadapter.service.AnalyzeAST simplified :
      preadapter.service.AnalyzeAST--diagram--simplified.svg
    - Full diagram detailed and grouped per namespace:
      full--diagram--detailed--grouped--per--namespace.svg
    - Home:
      index.html
  end note

@enduml
